reviews.text:

+ not enough place for parking: the parking lot is so small, cars had to park on the main stage .Ours had to park so far away from the hotel (the hotel security guy requested) and it took lots of time to walk back (1km far from the hotel location) and car parking fee was asked to be born by guests (hotel receptionist said hotel would not provide support for parking fee).  
+ unhelpful and impolite staffs: The staff didn’t even pay attention to us, and didn’t even help us on the baggage. No one helped us to carry luggages so that my child have to carry by himself and unfortunately dropped the luggage at the door stairs made it broken, the security guy noticed that but he ignored us to manage by ourselves. 
+The food was fine but the rice was sticky. 
Overall TERRIBLE. 
we would never come back this hotel again

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Terrible breakfast and service

reviews.title: Amenities below expectations.
reviews.text:
- The hotel is clean, with a minimalist room design and amenities, and the staff cleans the rooms quite thoroughly and organizes the space neatly.
- It's a 4-star hotel but doesn't have room service. So at this price, you could probably get a more spacious apartment, since you have to go out to eat anyway.
- The pool is clean, the water is warm enough but there are no staff members at the pool.
- The front desk extended and upgraded my room for a fee for 3 days (June 10-12) right at check-in, then on the afternoon of June 12, another front desk staff member called to confirm whether I would stay for the night of June 12 and asked which front desk staff had taken my money.
I will not return to any hotels in the Accor system.

Overall, this hotel is a 3-star hotel instead of a 4-star hotel

reviews.title: Wi-Fi and hygiene
reviews.text: The staff are friendly and the location is very good. However, the Wi-Fi in the guest rooms is very slow; it takes too long to load on my phone at only 1.2 Mbps! I went down to check the Wi-Fi in the lobby, and it was 17 Mbps!! It's hard to use my phone in the room and difficult to work as well. I think you should give up on the Wi-Fi. Also, since it's an old hotel, there is a lot of dirt in the rooms; there is a lot of mold and water stains in the corners of the bathroom, so please keep that in mind. The accommodation is humid and somewhat smelly, and I often see guests outside smoking with their heads out the window, which sometimes causes the smell of cigarettes to enter the room and bathroom. However, the daily cleaning is not bad. The lobby and community areas lack proper cleaning, though... it's quite a bit of a problem. Overall, it seems that the management is lacking in attention to detail.

reviews.text: The hotel is conveniently located for walking to the beach and visiting nearby attractions. The staff from all departments are very friendly and polite. It would be even better if there were welcome drinks for guests during check-in, but instead, we received support for an early check-in. As for the room on the 21st floor, the sea view is beautiful, the cleanliness is only fair, and the bed is very soft and comfortable for sleeping. However, upon first entering the room, there were a few patched areas on the surface of the bed, which the staff promptly assisted in replacing. Overall, for this price, the hotel is definitely worth experiencing.

reviews.text: The reception staff was enthusiastic and attentive, especially thanks to Mr. Dat, the head of the reception department. However, the check-in did not match the description on Agoda, and there were also no rooms available as per the customer's request made on Agoda. Although the hotel switched to a higher room category, I still could not accept it due to my needs and had to take the currently available room. The sound insulation in the room was not good; the sound of the shower from the upper floor was very loud in the lower floor, affecting the customer experience. The breakfast was poor, with only a few repeated dishes every day, which needs to improve to avoid boring long-term guests. Other than those issues, everything else was okay. Thanks!

reviews.title: Hotels with high cost-performance ratio.
reviews.text: The hotel standards in Southeast Asia are really low in all aspects. Some private hotels are especially dirty and completely do not meet our usual requirements. Fortunately, there are ibis hotels, which have a certain standard worldwide and do not lower their standards just because they are in Vietnam. The hotels are clean and hygienic, the staff is friendly, and they are close to shops and the beach. Although you can't see the beach directly from the room, that is precisely why the price is so affordable. Many privately-owned accommodations with similar prices have bed bugs and fleas, disgusting bathrooms, torn and yellow towels, windows that can't be closed, and invisible spider webs. Compared to them, the affordable ibis is simply paradise.
reviews.response:

Of course, I mean considering all aspects of the price ^^

As for the amenities, it seemed like everything was provided, and things like shampoo/body wash and hand wash were all on a refillable shelf~ The hairdryer is wall-mounted~

reviews.title: Well priced hotel with all mod cons in a central location.
reviews.text:
This Ibis styles was a great option when staying in Nha Trang. Centrally located and walking distance to everywhere, the beach, sailing club, great cheap eats and restaurants.  A room upgrade was offered upon arrival, I had a fantastic view of the beach, the facilities are good, gym and pool. The rooms are spacious, bed reasonably comfortable, good pillows, toiletries provided (except body wash). 
The in-house beauty spa on the same level as the pool and gym offers really good packages abs discounts for staying guests. The massage was great! 
The breakfast is plentiful with huge selection of Asian, western, fresh fruits and pastries. 
I felt really looked after by the staff who made me feel like a valued customer and I felt safe travelling solo. The hotel is clean and fresh. I would highly recommend staying at this hotel. The level of service and the hotel overall I rate higher than a 3 star for sure!

reviews.title: Modern hotel, great location, and friendly staff!
reviews.text: We just had a very satisfying experience at Ibis Styles Nha Trang. The hotel has a modern, youthful design and is extremely clean. The location is very convenient, just a few minutes walk to the beach and near many bustling dining areas. The staff are very enthusiastic, professional, and always support our group wholeheartedly from check-in to check-out. The rooms are well-equipped, have a beautiful view, and the breakfast is diverse and suits our taste. We will definitely come back here if we have the chance to visit Nha Trang again!
reviews.response:

Trân trọng,

Executive Assistant Manager

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
Месторасположение. На второй линии у пляжа. До моря пешком идти минут 5. Вокруг магазины, минимаркеты, ресторанчики, базарчики (из отеля налево, метров 100-150 есть ночной рынок). 
Пляж городской, лежаки платные (100 000 донг/день). Вода чистая, грязи на пляже и в воде не замечено. 

Останавливался на день, так что сойдет.
reviews.negatives:
На фото отель выглядит лучше чем в жизни. Да, понятно, что за такую цену ждать чего-то особенного не стоит, однако, при выборе отеля, я взял на 50% подороже из за имени бренда, хотя были примерно такие же (красивые фото) но дешевле в 2 раза. 
Все начинается с ресепшена. Видно, что все запущено, нечисто, обшарпанно. 
Сам номер по дизайну необычный. На фото смотрится классно и свежо. В жизни тоже неплохо, но все же на любителя. 
В номере, впринципе, есть все что нужно, даже щетки с пастами, расчески. Тапочки только многоразовые. У меня были свои, не надевал. Дают 2 бесплатной воды. Кровать нормальная. 
При входе в номер меня встретил спертый запах. Предположительно - курили. Открыл окно и оставил на час, стало получше. Персоналу нужно бы проветривать помещения.
